cards.back: In bocca al lupo! — Crepi (il lupo)! (lit. "Into the wolf's mouth!" — "May the wolf die!")

cards.front: Quick and easy; done in no time

cards.back: Un pezzo di pane (lit. "a piece of bread")

cards.front: To give up / throw in the towel
cards.back: Mollare il colpo (lit. "to release the blow")
Non vedo l'ora (lit. "I don't see the hour")

cards.front: Keep it secret! / Mum's the word
cards.back: Acqua in bocca! (lit. "Water in the mouth!")

cards.front: To cost a fortune / an arm and a leg
cards.back: Costare un occhio della testa (lit. "to cost an eye from the head")
